instruction: Enter the training plan information into the training ledger

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Training Plan
Training Name: New Employee Orientation
Training Date: 2025-04-07 to 2025-04-11
Location: 3F Training Room
Instructor: HR Dept, Liao Yan
Participants: 12
Training Cost: 8500 CNY
Training Objective: Understand company culture, policies and basic business processes' > /home/user/Desktop/training_plan.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Training Name'; ws['B1'] = 'Date'; ws['C1'] = 'Location'; ws['D1'] = 'Instructor'; ws['E1'] = 'Headcount'; ws['F1'] = 'Cost(CNY)'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/training_record.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Enter the training plan information into the training ledger

Fill the training information from /home/user/Desktop/training_plan.txt into /home/user/Desktop/training_record.xlsx row 2: A2='New Employee Orientation', B2='2025-04-07 to 2025-04-11', C2='3F Training Room', D2='Liao Yan', E2=12, F2=8500, save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/training_record.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'Liao Yan' in s else 'FAILED')"
